worldData.instructions:
Assemble a starship from garnet cells on the FCC lattice, then fly your design.
BUILD — A/D cycle attachment site · W/S cycle component · SPACE place · SHIFT remove last · arrows orbit the camera · ENTER launch.
Your physics are your build.
R (or the ⟲ button) — reset the build. Your best score keeps.
